items.title: Why Apple silicon Macs aren't immune to RAM price hikes
items.summary: Despite what's sometimes claimed on social media, Apple cannot escape memory prices that have doubled in recent months. Here's why. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: Why Wall Street thinks US memory maker Micron is the next Nvidia
items.summary: Eager to find more public AI-related companies that may do as well as Nvidia, Wall Street investors think they've found a winner with Micron.

items.title: Apple working on M7 Ultra Mac Studio for 2028 with potential major upgrade: report

items.title: Your iPhone could soon be spotted by license plate cameras
items.summary: SignalTrace adds Bluetooth and Wi-Fi tracking to license plate cameras, letting police link your iPhone to your car without a warrant. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )
